title: LeagueMember (R-I6) — one learner's OWN-ROW weekly league standing (their tier + REAL weekly-XP snapshot for an ISO-week). Own-row like user_course: a learner reads + writes ONLY their own membership; the cross-user leaderboard (co-members' XP) is a server-side read path in a later slice, never a direct cross-row client SELECT.

cohort_id.description: The league_cohort this membership belongs to. NULL until cohort formation assigns it (a later slice); the DB-level FK to league_cohort is added with formation. Stored as uuid.

week_start.description: The Monday (date-only) of the league week this standing is for, per LeagueWeek.startOf.

tier.description: LeagueTier.name from the member's perspective this week (stored as text; engine maps an unknown value to bronze for forward-compat).

weekly_xp.description: The member's REAL weekly XP snapshot (mirrors friendship.weekly_xp; the leaderboard read side). Client-asserted exactly like xp_total/streak, clamped server-side.
